situational_context: Return-to-running protocol Week 1 initiated. First run in 182 days completed May 3 (2.47 km, 21 min, HR avg 135, suffer 7 — no pain reported). Chronic load rising slowly (17.8 -> 23.5 over 17 days, +32%) but still at 1.5% of 2023 historical peak (1608). ACWR normalized to 1.03 after May 1 gravel spike (load 55). Primary activities: ebike commuting on sur-site days (2-3x/week), one gravel commute, one return run. Readiness consistently high (training readiness 83 today, body battery 62). RHR improved from 53 to 49 bpm. Weight trending down -2.1 kg in 3 weeks (106.9 -> 104.8). VO2max running recalibrated from 40.9 to 38.6 after first run. Baby (Leonie, 16 months) is scheduling constraint, not recovery bottleneck. Vitamin D 27 ng/mL (Dec 2025) — stress fracture risk factor, supplementation ongoing.

plan_7d_ahead.type: Sur site commute (ebike or gravel TBD)
Retour running #2 OU Endurance velo Z2

recommendations.text: Continue return-to-running protocol: attempt 2nd short run (2-3 km, Z1-Z2) Saturday May 9 if no localized pain since May 3 run. Surface souple, marche intercalee si HR >145. Max 25 min.
recommendations.measurable: Complete 1 run of 2-3 km at HR avg <145 bpm without post-run pain lasting >24h

recommendations.text: Increase daily protein intake to >=150g — current 7d avg is 124g (18% below target). Critical for tendon collagen synthesis during running rebuild, especially at 105 kg body weight.
Confirm May 7 commute mode before Friday session planning. If gravel with suffer >30, convert Friday to rest and prioritize weekend sessions. If ebike, proceed with Friday Z2 as planned.
recommendations.measurable: Friday session decision made by Thursday evening based on commute data

markers_to_watch.threshold: Any localized pain (Achilles, patellar, plantar, tibia) lasting >24h after May 3 or May 9 run
markers_to_watch.reason: 105 kg BW + 182-day gap = elevated tendon/bone stress fracture risk. Vitamin D 27 ng/mL compounds risk.

markers_to_watch.threshold: Stabilization or uptick from 38.6 over next 2-3 weeks
markers_to_watch.reason: Recalibrated down from 40.9 after first run — expected, but persistent decline would signal cardio detraining beyond expected.

markers_to_watch.threshold: Target gradual increase toward 30+ over next 2 weeks
markers_to_watch.reason: At 1.5% of historical peak — structured sessions should move this meaningfully.
